name: JFrog Ltd
business: JFrog provides a unified platform for managing and securing the software supply chain, enabling organizations to unify development, security, governance, and delivery of software applications. The platform serves enterprise customers including a majority of the Fortune 500.

exposures.sentence: JFrog Xray (Security Essentials). JFrog Xray continuously scans JFrog Artifactory to secure all software packages stored in it.
JFrog AI Catalog is offered as an extension of JFrog Curation functionality that allows companies to secure, govern, consume and deploy AI technologies, including first- and third-party ML models.
